title: Scape: Till the End
description: A re-creation of my most popular modpack which has since stopped working (last update) and I could not figure out why. This modpack plans to completely rework the original intentions of my modpack.
body:
# A re-creation of my original modpack (Scape) which is now obsolete.


This modpack plans to revive that same feel with my old one which has blown up tremendously in the past four months.
This modpack adds:
- Guns
- SRP
- SRP: Addons
- Tinkers Construct
- Tinkers Construct: Addons



 And so much more to come!

 If you liked my original version of this then you will love this modpack!
